name: Randy Velarde
transactions: June 3, 1985:Drafted by theChicago White Soxin the19th roundof the 1985 amateur draft. Player signed June 14, 1985.
January 5, 1987:Traded by theChicago White SoxwithPete Filsonto theNew York YankeesforMike Soper(minors) andScott Nielsen.
April 12, 1995:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
November 21, 1995:Signed as a Free Agent with theCalifornia Angels.
December 7, 1998:Signed as a Free Agent with theAnaheim Angels.
July 29, 1999:Traded by theAnaheim AngelswithOmar Olivaresto theOakland AthleticsforElvin Nina(minors),Jeff DaVanonandNathan Haynes.
November 17, 2000:Traded by theOakland Athleticsto theTexas RangersforRyan Cullen(minors) andAaron Harang.

August 31, 2001:Traded by theTexas Rangersto theNew York Yankeesfor players to be named later. TheNew York YankeessentRandy Flores(October 12, 2001) andRosman García(October 11, 2001) to theTexas Rangersto complete the trade.
January 11, 2002:Signed as a Free Agent with theOakland Athletics.
